testcase.name: test_order_creates_client_notification

failure.message: AssertionError: Failed to create order: Internal Server Error assert 520 == 200 + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_notifications_iteration26.py:247: in test_order_creates_client_notification assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to create order: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create order: Internal Server Error E assert 520 == 200 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code
